log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:1+3=4 vs AC 14] MISS.

→ Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician: DEX save [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+1=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):12+1=13 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):10+1=11 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
